name: Retrospective (Agile)
description: Sprint retrospective template for continuous improvement.

sections.title: Sprint
sections.instruction: Extract the sprint name/number and date range only if explicitly stated in the transcript; otherwise leave blank

sections.title: Attendance
sections.instruction: List each participant named in the transcript

sections.title: Start Doing
sections.instruction: List actions or experiments the team proposed to start next sprint, with the proposer if stated

sections.title: Stop Doing
sections.instruction: List practices the team proposed to stop, with the reason if stated

sections.title: Continue Doing
sections.instruction: List practices the team agreed to keep, with supporting notes if stated

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List concrete follow-up experiments with owner, due date, and success metric, only where each was actually stated; otherwise leave the cell blank (do not write 'None'). In the Ref column, cite the moment the item was agreed as @ref(MM:SS) — for example @ref(01:05) — whenever clearly identifiable in the transcript; otherwise leave the cell blank

sections.title: Notes & Votes
sections.instruction: Summarize the discussion and note any top-voted items, based only on what was said
